title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: python3.12 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for python3.12 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for ARM 64

fixes.description: annocheck 'hardened' test fails for /usr/lib64/libpython3.12.so.1.0 on x86_64 due to missing -fcf-protection
annocheck 'hardened' test fails for /usr/lib64/libpython3.12.so.1.0 on aarch64 due to missing -mbranch-protection=standard

full_text:
An update for python3.12 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
